data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Facebook Messenger booking option', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this booking option. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks to substantiate this requirement leads to a clear gap in validation.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence or functionality of the 'Facebook Messenger booking option'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for Facebook Messenger booking option
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls and checks to verify the functionality of the Facebook Messenger booking option.
